effectsRemoved.name: Sonic Damage 1d6
effectsRemoved.notes: Screaming weapons emit a piercing screech whenever they are used to make a successful attack. This screech does an additional 1d6 sonic damage.

effectsRemoved.name: Sonic Damage 2d6
effectsRemoved.notes: This weapon causes targets to become shaken and, on a critical hit, does 2d6 sonic damage to the target.

effectsRemoved.name: Telekinetic
effectsRemoved.notes: Targets that suffer a critical hit from a telekinetic weapon must make a DC Strength or Dexterity DC: 17 check or be knocked down. The target will then be force to make Balance DC: 16 checks to recover from the effect.

effectsRemoved.name: Slicing Winds
effectsRemoved.notes: This weapon stores the cyclonic might of the windstorm within. When the weapon is used, this power can come to the surface as a series of rushing, cutting winds that deal slashing damage to the target over several seconds.

effectsAdded.name: Sonic Damage 1d6
effectsAdded.notes: Screaming weapons emit a piercing screech whenever they are used to make a successful attack. This screech does an additional 1d6 sonic damage.

effectsAdded.name: Sonic Damage 2d6
effectsAdded.notes: This weapon causes targets to become shaken and, on a critical hit, does 2d6 sonic damage to the target.

effectsAdded.name: Greater Telekinetic
effectsAdded.notes: Targets that suffer a critical hit from a telekinetic weapon must make a DC Strength or Dexterity DC: 17 check or be knocked down. The target will then be force to make Balance DC: 16 checks to recover from the effect.

effectsAdded.name: Slicing Winds
effectsAdded.notes: This weapon stores the cyclonic might of the windstorm within. When the weapon is used, this power can come to the surface as a series of rushing, cutting winds that deal slashing damage to the target over several seconds.

effectsAdded.name: Greater Sirocco
effectsAdded.notes: A critical hit with this weapon causes a whirlwind of desert sand to swirl about the target, temporarily blinding it. A successful Reflex DC: 38 save prevents the effect

effectsRemoved.name: Boon of Undeath
effectsRemoved.notes: Undead take solace in the hate of others. Every time a character wearing a Boon of Undeath item is struck in combat, an Inflict Light Wounds spell will be cast on the character.

effectsAdded.name: Lesser Arcane Augmentation IX
effectsAdded.notes: Lesser Arcane Augmentation IX: This item increases your caster level when casting first through ninth level sorcerer or wizard spells by one.

effectsAdded.name: Boon of Undeath
effectsAdded.notes: Undead take solace in the hate of others. Every time a character wearing a Boon of Undeath item is struck in combat, an Inflict Light Wounds spell will be cast on the character.

effectsRemoved.name: Spell Point Cost Reduction
effectsRemoved.notes: Any spellcaster can use this energy to partially power their spells. All spells cast while holding this item receive an enhancement bonus of -10% spell point cost.

effectsAdded.name: Spell Point Cost Reduction
effectsAdded.notes: Any spellcaster can use this energy to partially power their spells. All spells cast while holding this item receive an enhancement bonus of -10% spell point cost.

effectsAdded.name: Blinding Embers
effectsAdded.notes: If you roll a 20 when attacking and confirm the critical hit, the target will become blinded by a burst of fiery sparks.

Greater Dispelling Guard
effectsAdded.notes: When the wearer is hit in melee it will apply a Greater Dispel Magic effect to the attacker, stripping away its protective spells.
